rationale: The formal EU accession process launch for Ukraine is a meaningful milestone for Ukrainians' future, though no new qualitative step beyond prior confirmation; the war continues as background reality with no new escalation.

top_events.title: EU agrees launch of accession process for Ukraine and Moldova
top_events.summary: The formal EU accession launch is a significant milestone for Ukraine's European future and postwar reconstruction prospects, though it is a continuation of the previously confirmed process.

top_events.title: Iran war: US and Tehran signal peace deal within reach
top_events.summary: A US-Iran deal could free up US diplomatic and military bandwidth, but its direct impact on Western aid to Ukraine is uncertain and indirect at best.

top_events.title: US Congressman says Trump won't send loads of money to Iran
top_events.summary: Congressional pushback on Iran deal terms signals US political constraints, with uncertain downstream effects on US foreign policy priorities including Ukraine aid.
